summary: Completed testing of Email + 4-digit PIN authentication endpoints and web dashboard UI. All 14 backend auth tests passed (100%). Web dashboard UI correctly shows both email auth and code link options, but the dashboard is hardcoded to use external Render server (https://justblr-backend.onrender.com/api) which returns 404 for auth endpoints.

integration_issues.issue: Web dashboard (index.html) is hardcoded to use external Render server API_URL='https://justblr-backend.onrender.com/api' which returns 404 for auth endpoints. Should use configurable URL or localhost:8001 for local testing.

action_items: Update /app/web/index.html to use configurable API_URL (e.g., from environment or detect localhost vs production)
Deploy auth endpoints to the Render server (https://justblr-backend.onrender.com) if web dashboard should work in production
critical_code_review_comments: Auth endpoints (register, login, me, logout) are correctly implemented with proper error handling
Password hashing uses SHA256 with salt - consider using bcrypt for production
Token generation uses secrets.token_urlsafe(32) which is secure
Token invalidation on logout works correctly
Migration endpoint correctly updates device_id for reminders and contacts

success_rate.frontend: UI elements present but integration blocked by hardcoded external API URL

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* prefixed users during testing for auth flow verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_auth_api.py cover all auth CRUD operations. Web dashboard UI is correct but points to external Render server. Mobile app (Expo/React Native) cannot be tested in browser - needs native build.

POST /api/auth/register.details: Creates user with email, password (4-digit PIN), optional name. Returns user object with device_id and token.

POST /api/auth/login.details: Authenticates with email and password. Returns user with device_id and token.

POST /api/auth/login wrong password.details: Returns 401 with 'Invalid email or password' message

GET /api/auth/me.details: With valid token returns user info. Without token returns 401.

POST /api/reminders/migrate.details: Migrates reminders from one device_id to another. Also migrates contacts.

Web dashboard login screen.details: Shows both email auth (email, PIN, Sign In button) and code link options (6-digit code inputs, Link Device button). Toggle between login/register modes works.
